Muhammad ﷺ is the seal of the Prophets, sent as a mercy to all the worlds.
The Qur'an was revealed to him over 23 years through the angel Jibril, beginning in the cave of Hira.
His wife Aishah said his character was the Qur'an — truthful, merciful, just, and humble.
He established the religion, completed the message, and left behind the Book of Allah and his Sunnah as guidance until the Day of Judgement.
